		<guid isPermaLink="false" />

					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 80 MB</p>
<p>A tournament of the world's fiercest fighters has been decimated after a Predator's lethal hunt. As the Yautja zeroes in on the few survivors left standing, one warrior's true purpose is finally unmasked. With deadly danger from within and without, it's kill or be killed. Will the Predator collect its final trophy?</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/predator-bloodshed-4-2026/">Predator &#8211; Bloodshed #4 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
</description>

items.item_xml:
<item xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:slash="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/" xmlns:wfw="http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/" xmlns:wp9="com-wordpress:feed-additions:1">
		<title>Predator Kills The Marvel Universe (TPB) (2026)</title>
		<link>https://getcomics.org/marvel/predator-kills-the-marvel-universe-tpb-2026/</link>
					<comments>https://getcomics.org/marvel/predator-kills-the-marvel-universe-tpb-2026/#respond</comments>
		
		<dc:creator>The Comic Guy</dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Thu, 14 May 2026 00:44:38 +0000</pubDate>
				<category>Marvel Comics</category>
		<category>Non 0-Day</category>
		<category>Predator</category>
		<category>TPB</category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false" />

					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 413 MB</p>
<p>The biggest crossover yet between the iconic franchises of Marvel and Predator! A Predator King, emboldened by a new vibranium arsenal and aided by a surprising human ally, launches an all-out invasion of Earth, claiming the planet as a hunting preserve! After several battles in our solar system - which devastate both the Guardians of the Galaxy and the Fantastic Four - the Predators escalate to the next stage of their war. And the X-Men and the Avengers are at the top of their kill list! Wolverine, Spider-Man and Black Panther call on all their experience battling Predators in the past, and an unexpected ally makes an appearance…but will it be enough? Who will survive this extinction-level event as the entire Marvel Universe finds itself in the tri-laser crosshairs of the Predators?! Collecting PREDATOR KILLS THE MARVEL UNIVERSE (2025) #1-5.</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/predator-kills-the-marvel-universe-tpb-2026/">Predator Kills The Marvel Universe (TPB) (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
</description>
